Software application

Operate devices and gateways with total clarity

A mobile-first UI that turns complex infrastructure into simple, actionable views. Every screen uses masked identifiers and summary metrics so operators see only what they need.

Tenant-aware login and role access
Status rings, device counts, and map filters
Private data masked by default

Mobile experience

See the app on a phone, in motion

The phone view cycles through core app states so operators can picture the real workflow on a handheld device.

Tenant login

Capabilities

Built for operators, safe for data

Every feature emphasizes clarity, speed, and data protection across teams.

Real-time status

Live health indicators update without noisy tables.

Multi-tenant control

Switch tenants while keeping data neatly isolated.

Map intelligence

Filter sites and clusters with quick map controls.

Alerts & insights

Surface exceptions before they impact uptime.

Fast search

Find devices and apps in seconds with clean filtering.

Privacy-first UI

Sensitive identifiers are masked at every layer.

Privacy

Show only what matters

Operators can work confidently knowing the interface hides private or regulated fields.

Masked device IDs, IPs, and tenant identifiers
Role-based visibility for sensitive modules
Audit-friendly views with minimal exposure
Masking is enabled by default for every account.

Privacy-first workflow

See the right data, not all data.

View

See high-level health and counts.

Filter

Narrow by status, region, or application.

Act

Open detail screens with approved access only.

Sensitive fields such as tenant IDs, device IDs, and IP addresses remain hidden unless explicitly authorized.

Ready to explore the software application?

We can tailor the UI to your operation and deployment model.
